function.content:

  "subject": "Security review follow-up",
  "to": "bram.jansen@blue-harbor-bank.example.com",
  "body": "Checking in on the open security review. Happy to answer questions and align on next steps.",
  "attachments": [],
  "sent": false
}

function.message: Done — I prepared the outbound email to Blue Harbor Bank with the requested subject and body.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.md, context). Followed AGENTS.md rule to send outbound email by writing to outbox. Followed outbox/README.MD invariant: used pre-bump seq id as filename and then incremented seq.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical recipient was resolved from accounts/acct_004.json -> contacts/cont_004.json (bram.jansen@blue-harbor-bank.example.com). Wrote outbox/84922.json with subject "Security review follow-up", requested body text, sent=false, then bumped outbox/seq.json from 84922 to 84923.
